name: QQ Bot Open Platform
description: Tencent QQ Bot Open Platform integration. Outbound via api.sgroup.qq.com /v2/groups/{id}/messages or /v2/users/{id}/messages with QQBot-style Authorization header (appid + bot access_token). Token rotated against bots.qq.com/app/getAppAccessToken (2-hour TTL, 60s skew). Set QQBOT_APPID + QQBOT_SECRET. Inbound WebSocket gateway is a focused follow-up — this PR ships outbound.
